title: Running Podman on Windows Server 2019
body: Does Podman support windows server 2019 which installed on VM?

comments.body: We require WSL2, and Server 2019 appears to support it, so I would assume yes, but I don't think anyone has tested this before.

I got the error below on Server 2019

OS Name:                   Microsoft Windows Server 2019 Standard
OS Version:                10.0.17763 N/A Build 17763

> podman machine init
Error: your version of Windows does not support WSL. Update to Windows 10 Build 19041 or later

Any updates? I also need install podman on the windows server 2019 and tried almost ways from googled results.
so, the answer is "No"?
The answer today is you must have WSL.  We have discussed alternatives but nothing has been implemented.
